Flat concept inventory:
- A survey of X-of-Thought | papers: c88cafa3e980765a64febe369ceb7c2aa7261d2a; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; b626560f19f815808a289ef5c24a17c57320da70; 6c1e1cc1e0e1f8fd026fe517607b2d4535565fa7; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691; 6d003fce1bfa44f99afc752ec173c9004fe3d59e; 90350aa626bed47b02d0c162462e5b0ca82be6b2; eed2a631d672a4130407f8d69a0ad9118a1e6e7d; 4e3e064e6613e2c40c1fa5dc2bd8fd934b410ccb; 62176de125738e3b95850d1227bac81fd646b78e; 7eaaa5aec72ffb95cf538462ed205fa4d4faef9c; 717392dac099d1506b766787382d61b277863163; e7ad08848d5d7c5c47673ffe0da06af443643bda; 751c100802012764a2c45e17e41fa219867b12e5; 1358f90705b05cdb20ebe6799b02196205e7e9f0; dca6c3927ade6481a1ae080f5c24decbfeced1be; 3e565c544a8639cc9c7568833e484d7610f5e5d4; 49293522fe3818769f5067e360c971bd7a82e0aa; 69619a2a47faee7a29ec596db13172e2a42ff921; 0aaf7a76507248d80f65b6a49e200d2370bcb2c9; fca92fe287c44c9ec79ca1f2762b0bf2e5e8df2b; c2408a3a8da4f12d3eb156fe359a96b428e5aff1; 66d98dc2aad17c03532dbae21d05f098257cc2e2; 9e9e4df2996bac794c4f04cb887df3e553bae4fd; 3d473cbb7a377cf960abff31748a1a39bb6c7d7c; 3784fd84b61d482b52f7ef72aac66bcb886b892b; bda605928d6ebe4db906e69ab5d343df75918727; 2f3822eb380b5e753a6d579f31dfc3ec4c4a0820; 875d71bae61a66f7e65a2b6d363b7a0a27a6ed25; fdcef72d381d1ad3c374b602a2c1de7558250331; aade40af0d85b0b4fe15c97f6222d5c2e4d6d9b3; ba4aa83248a1d08b521392eb971e47d10b7c74e1; 19e499d76a2e49574b499cd9ebd31304880d33d6; be9447ccc05a0e8a07321272778c7574173cf00e; 6d4bacb69923e1e94fb4de468b939ce6db32fb51; cb4f6823e25896d5919046696066d0d498cc4397; 4d2a0840abd2eef795a4e14538271e06f8536b07; 22d5459d1f47341b355feeb1becc37208d6ec365; c715914c388fa64dd8686cd8755e5adfebbf2388; 0671fd553dd670a4e820553a974bc48040ba0819; 5d5dbba58aaf5b3fa4044cc3ffc71a3fe2b8c654; 3aaf6a2cbad5850ad81ab5c163599cb3d523436f; f02e8f1c9b5ab12ddfb1977570f9f5445a99a973; e826ac71dad8c4ce36d82fb7add43e3d306bb7e1; 8236010c2ecc94d826be6010ff187fdc000e7df6; 629c441076da3f8185b1cf85e8036064b714e249; 2ed0504ec0a97c3419a97e888abbf50f2b6976ab; 9890cef95f289670572c7f9093253a48f3a48c58; bcdaf6c98ddbd6809cf6241aa77200d7394db163; 20eecb9ead20ffe49a66588a9662336eefb20a54; 98aa313fbe30734eb3bb50683204765bcbc607eb; ef018d9fad6167cfddb7d6654c5422df1e953730; f58ca7ba4a08b7082e86b7a5989b4b0fda2107ab; 5988806996e8d12f5d4aa911960d842cf7be0c24; 07955e96cbd778d0ae2a68f09d073b866dd84c2a; f208ea909fa7f54fea82def9a92fd81dfc758c39; 5437e8adab596d7294124c0e798708e050e25321; 261549439aebdda72b648ecc462448fd24857ac1; 69335077fcacbff7a7cf25697da1949e6bdfa968; c90151f00b1ac4abf1cc353849b453aa21cc2df3; 622b064bd56d5be022f6dae9f7656fa8b658e0cf; 507acddb0b7f36b83fd7c8bff2f121eb506ac8fb; 3f4d11971f2c64be9125a7fe99c019588bbebf16; e070ff286709db28312e08b52b05539debe88146; 4b0b56be0ae9479d2bd5c2f0943db1906343c10f; 97992c13baa6185c03d9e672f53185bc59822596; 80fd20e175f83a699258b8780cf365418d1538b0; 9efa81ec4954b0859c47dad8f42edfaf8bced69b; 6db6e6e71cc54435265643e19fcbdc7f3ba4c772; 10955e63aa49fab146267949f8ebc9ebe8275183; 7e4f5589327b6b574cc950a03fd1d6236e9e6128; 0786c88990235414611478099e43611542d973b0; bd1ef429956cea3542c14006df67e890cb57a80b; a1675f47125aa409525c5f759b5e6bcc1c8831aa; f6007270b8aba3a69eac7c98375c99b7ca26c9b0; 62f0db3a5ad5c795ec18fc7a6e7b01836809df57; 1e6102c981b9464c632ef0b00dbd11dfb0564e4e; 5f19ae1135a9500940978104ec15a5b8751bc7d2; d6045d2ccc9c09ca1671348de86d07da6bc28eea; d59e4560e3f3b8d53b0660e4ca2d6ea8d559787b; 03ae1a664b52503594e4753f59615443d70695b6; f176d0d466d7c778a6435fe9a8d7e49508cb9059; 385c74957858e7d6856d48e72b5a902b4c1aa28c; 4780d0a027c5c5a8e01d7cf697f6296880ffc945; 3fc3460c4554a28e489a0ea6ef067b79b7d301d9; b4a6c010724f0459c9791018e34a982cf96987cf; d8e9f8c8a37cb4cd26b92ad0d942d641cd512644; 0d42221038c05cee8443c5b5af838505ee137dc3; 95ca67ba607d7859ee8eec457f4b59b115d69bf5; 3bd83ff979f3c0e9470f23c360a18333593dc5a1; d1120d67b700e4dfe8b39eb1e48fbdea4e1a0c43; 32dcd0887537cece54e214f531d2c384470b023f; 12b233752c7097ea6525622bed238ae2d2193c5a; c7a9c7302a72301ed79a7c0696d5af2e03ad3ac4; 1bcde55995a957b3e8a595d536b816cb8989cf1d; b1c9c455acb1393f1bf60ec4095ee343531e404e; 99832586d55f540f603637e458a292406a0ed75d; 354bf043179e3e9f05df73e3f04517e53c326d1f; 017f1c28c7d4fb65c6fff7d3c2fff1687597e252; 446fb5dead075a1a08862662738f462e9a0e91c8; 0bfc804e31eecfd77f45e4ee7f4d629fffdcd628; 53d128ea815bcc0526856eb5a9c42cc977cb36a7; c7a3f9cc61cfafdc307f8ae24430b6b1121f9b2c; 8e37dc1215681aa153a51c07078ba8befd6a6e01; 6ab33b17cd45e7cbd2cb9b0c5a2d56e5eac1c814; dcf87f11e245b76437c2f551c1ff6a7842585811; 700bd9681f1b9e9e2212e10415d27b11c7e6836b; a6c57acfbcec39af366d33db18cff1cb8803b27a; 003ef1cd670d01af05afa0d3c72d72228f494432; 5dbffedcabe3fa43060ebbe2b1789500edfd871f; 5ce94181ea702f69c3651dce721d6bd8026b8106; 33eed6ea6805b59617fed7c41ef5825b5e4d1621; b272513916b45c8517d289d7abee4a53e6832187; 1e98a9532d4e1fcf947d5b215e2cfabbf6cc41e0; 79e7ead8f59b17431de2b86af10dc0c30a1f5a2b; 0744580e75a74357e466a57082c85cb42f548aa9; a83724fd55cd2bcf5583ca181373c34571ac1f73; aad167be3c902388ea625da4117fcae4325b8b7d; 4411e6b32865933cab87696c2738cb7a204e4240; b29134737a0c81c13d31fc0263b3c4d4f05ccb78; 56fa65d8dc41708082f9b2ef7752c49cee9ebe01; 7a6a298efb965ce9a351a3212f6f536e94dbbb03; e892a225c417fbac7545c3e31b45d1c42dc9c933; 23dd78e424d32f6a48660dcd67ce994b8a7db8be; 8a6233a6b29f4880847412d7e2bd6d59b1812cc6; 3fa70115248377c3d1517c9f978791a296fbc1dd; fbd49b25bdab98c171af49962a41139c73dacbde; be7dbac2bcaed4cd034a7371004a011933e1bdca; 126a4776ff8315fd506766cb8f3c722cf746ad9e; 4b6a04202535ea67942f0ca656d51c4246da0495; 4f8608bb4b5943032bd23995a5b44d04d7faba3c; bb8f7fbec020675d269ccfa0e6e603f02b664c0d; 1bd9466f0bb10d29a16f614943ec7823e13cb210; dac96fa0198b4b15191aa022257edce349f41d2a; 4ba57555bef02f988f2ed3bab2f102733dc55221; 38333f6e8f0388968edc4b2ea7a683ce69677e69; adb9acaf9184bdbd23105f1a383848eed9bc82fc; 868b7ea007786ec07af2d8ae96f89e04508dd167; 780a7f5e8ba9b4b451e3dfee1bcfb0f68aba5050; 3f758a13d3703b02bdf977f9189230276064da42; ecfe2becc1040d3810c10f006d4be43b4eef3c41; 79429814fd4d967b9277af2805c53f370e52ebb5; 8154fb1d828cdc390dc1fa442d84034948679c47; 827afa7dd36e4afbb1a49c735bfbb2c69749756e; 490d8006851b1562cfd9ec1f057471f2868289d1; 6825ba09383bc758f9a2feaebabe35a6cd4adc4c; 71d68782c3da41b77866c2fd0cb65726f60b3af1; 35922cd0d6b17e45320917338e9f98cb5c1a4f6f; fdf16ba99ddeb9a82311b7565143cf9ccfd004a8; 29c7f009df21d0112c48dec254ff80cc45fac3af; 768850402f991a97ce7a7d063d07050add0254ca; 4988b3d378b79eb8669112620baf1ff4e3e536fd; c2260403fd5cb2de73491323433e48b6ec36872c; 7bd4ca8706a79983d31ab74e6c79bfdfd949602e; 70ca99ac3c21f353b3db948004510a09fdebc4f2; 4ac776e01407c439d4b7d9764de9288193a1748f; b123a0d46ad917b79c43c5ae981e03ed2458ed11; f13e41d24e5d0a68ca662c1b49de398a6fb68251; a7862e14b4c20cefd6dc4f611f8aa866fabf130b; d96997265f8146e93b4c9350f19d55e46d1317f0; dda6fb309f62e2557a071522354d8c2c897a2805; 99053e3a708fc27709c9dab33110dc98b187c158; 52fb239ea5cea1e9a2636f8f7922c8ede3e50ba7; 57d1e7ac339e783898f2c3b1af55737cbeee9fc5; 2bdbb07bc12b8d8c332b7a84aa05e76218c07cd9; eef7cfe8267954adbb4675576072a1d80ca7a3a8; 4c6fe6179c408e1fbb3871af13d1a8e64f766e54; 39238a92de090c104936a4f78375b95600e42ce5; 13c4e5a6122f3fa2663f63e49537091da6532f35; 17230f5b3956188055a48c5f4f61d131cce0662f; b3213c84a6ff7a2f11099de783c93166e4fc02a4; a52dd1e900200e0733eea927edc7d6c27aeba187; b6667ba4f586489f12587446c6daaa3f09cfc539; 1d3dd6a85ef874a328d34305b884eac5113e292d; d65a064eb837f838faf6ff67781b62450b92b159; e5a400f9663b3d1f6784cd078f5a471e4f17535b; c21a4d70d83e0f6eb2a9e1c41d034842dd561e47; 66117f82def0c69a3b9cc77eb3e2694b0245ca86; b7fbce48dfd734adbab95c669c290d9e4aaf3272; 81b4920ad488affaee27389ff9540b7fea90a4ce; 1536e8958697c5364f68b2e2448905dbbeb3a0ca; 04f4e55e14150b7c48b0287ba77c7443df76ed45; 346081161bdc8f18e2a4c4af7f51d35452b5cb01; bd1331b233e84bab7eba503abc60b31ac08e7881; 663a41c866d49ce052801fbc88947d39764cad29; 5581bf85386737bd3378eec68189759a05280bea; 70f2c1567ef94fdf4581e1290bf7667cc9a4dcfc; e7028cd7ea838ab8294ecf26d5a2c0dbb8cfa81a; 87c45a908537ffe1d2ab71a5d609bd7b4efa4fe1; 65723a96ff5b15f124bf3b534503950b537b4792; 806b5882c983bd156a8c10bcd34fe285d8a0593b; 68ef6138e007421f1a70e2d0ce1b3308a54cc784; 6233b5863f9a0e8bacce47ce21bc3e81c09497bd; 7c791da446a54a9f252b70c466d47e32d25540bb; d3135733aa39dec20ce72aa138589dda27c8406d; 6dfc2ff03534a4325d06c6f88c3144831996629b; 280353fd7a7a3e49c415c443e1b7ccf7de9c2b4e; 80ba19a949eee46af2bf58cd2f24949e009d884f; 50d331ec9e1c620f69659371724c0e384fcbb01b; - Advanced Methods | papers: c88cafa3e980765a64febe369ceb7c2aa7261d2a; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; b626560f19f815808a289ef5c24a17c57320da70; 6c1e1cc1e0e1f8fd026fe517607b2d4535565fa7; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691; 6d003fce1bfa44f99afc752ec173c9004fe3d59e; 90350aa626bed47b02d0c162462e5b0ca82be6b2; eed2a631d672a4130407f8d69a0ad9118a1e6e7d; 4e3e064e6613e2c40c1fa5dc2bd8fd934b410ccb; 62176de125738e3b95850d1227bac81fd646b78e; 7eaaa5aec72ffb95cf538462ed205fa4d4faef9c; 717392dac099d1506b766787382d61b277863163; e7ad08848d5d7c5c47673ffe0da06af443643bda; 751c100802012764a2c45e17e41fa219867b12e5; 1358f90705b05cdb20ebe6799b02196205e7e9f0; dca6c3927ade6481a1ae080f5c24decbfeced1be; 3e565c544a8639cc9c7568833e484d7610f5e5d4; 49293522fe3818769f5067e360c971bd7a82e0aa; 69619a2a47faee7a29ec596db13172e2a42ff921; 0aaf7a76507248d80f65b6a49e200d2370bcb2c9; fca92fe287c44c9ec79ca1f2762b0bf2e5e8df2b; c2408a3a8da4f12d3eb156fe359a96b428e5aff1; 66d98dc2aad17c03532dbae21d05f098257cc2e2; 9e9e4df2996bac794c4f04cb887df3e553bae4fd; 3d473cbb7a377cf960abff31748a1a39bb6c7d7c; 3784fd84b61d482b52f7ef72aac66bcb886b892b; bda605928d6ebe4db906e69ab5d343df75918727; 2f3822eb380b5e753a6d579f31dfc3ec4c4a0820; 875d71bae61a66f7e65a2b6d363b7a0a27a6ed25; fdcef72d381d1ad3c374b602a2c1de7558250331; aade40af0d85b0b4fe15c97f6222d5c2e4d6d9b3; ba4aa83248a1d08b521392eb971e47d10b7c74e1; 19e499d76a2e49574b499cd9ebd31304880d33d6; be9447ccc05a0e8a07321272778c7574173cf00e; 6d4bacb69923e1e94fb4de468b939ce6db32fb51; cb4f6823e25896d5919046696066d0d498cc4397; 4d2a0840abd2eef795a4e14538271e06f8536b07; 22d5459d1f47341b355feeb1becc37208d6ec365; c715914c388fa64dd8686cd8755e5adfebbf2388; 0671fd553dd670a4e820553a974bc48040ba0819; 5d5dbba58aaf5b3fa4044cc3ffc71a3fe2b8c654; 3aaf6a2cbad5850ad81ab5c163599cb3d523436f; f02e8f1c9b5ab12ddfb1977570f9f5445a99a973; e826ac71dad8c4ce36d82fb7add43e3d306bb7e1; 8236010c2ecc94d826be6010ff187fdc000e7df6; 629c441076da3f8185b1cf85e8036064b714e249; 2ed0504ec0a97c3419a97e888abbf50f2b6976ab; 9890cef95f289670572c7f9093253a48f3a48c58; bcdaf6c98ddbd6809cf6241aa77200d7394db163; 20eecb9ead20ffe49a66588a9662336eefb20a54; 98aa313fbe30734eb3bb50683204765bcbc607eb; ef018d9fad6167cfddb7d6654c5422df1e953730; f58ca7ba4a08b7082e86b7a5989b4b0fda2107ab; 5988806996e8d12f5d4aa911960d842cf7be0c24; 07955e96cbd778d0ae2a68f09d073b866dd84c2a; f208ea909fa7f54fea82def9a92fd81dfc758c39; 5437e8adab596d7294124c0e798708e050e25321; 261549439aebdda72b648ecc462448fd24857ac1; 69335077fcacbff7a7cf25697da1949e6bdfa968; c90151f00b1ac4abf1cc353849b453aa21cc2df3; 622b064bd56d5be022f6dae9f7656fa8b658e0cf; 507acddb0b7f36b83fd7c8bff2f121eb506ac8fb; 3f4d11971f2c64be9125a7fe99c019588bbebf16; e070ff286709db28312e08b52b05539debe88146; 4b0b56be0ae9479d2bd5c2f0943db1906343c10f; 97992c13baa6185c03d9e672f53185bc59822596; 80fd20e175f83a699258b8780cf365418d1538b0; 9efa81ec4954b0859c47dad8f42edfaf8bced69b; 6db6e6e71cc54435265643e19fcbdc7f3ba4c772; 10955e63aa49fab146267949f8ebc9ebe8275183; 7e4f5589327b6b574cc950a03fd1d6236e9e6128; 0786c88990235414611478099e43611542d973b0; bd1ef429956cea3542c14006df67e890cb57a80b; a1675f47125aa409525c5f759b5e6bcc1c8831aa; f6007270b8aba3a69eac7c98375c99b7ca26c9b0; 62f0db3a5ad5c795ec18fc7a6e7b01836809df57; 1e6102c981b9464c632ef0b00dbd11dfb0564e4e; 5f19ae1135a9500940978104ec15a5b8751bc7d2; d6045d2ccc9c09ca1671348de86d07da6bc28eea; d59e4560e3f3b8d53b0660e4ca2d6ea8d559787b; 03ae1a664b52503594e4753f59615443d70695b6; f176d0d466d7c778a6435fe9a8d7e49508cb9059; 385c74957858e7d6856d48e72b5a902b4c1aa28c; 4780d0a027c5c5a8e01d7cf697f6296880ffc945; 3fc3460c4554a28e489a0ea6ef067b79b7d301d9; b4a6c010724f0459c9791018e34a982cf96987cf; d8e9f8c8a37cb4cd26b92ad0d942d641cd512644
- XoT Prompt Construction | papers: c88cafa3e980765a64febe369ceb7c2aa7261d2a; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; b626560f19f815808a289ef5c24a17c57320da70; 6c1e1cc1e0e1f8fd026fe517607b2d4535565fa7; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691; 6d003fce1bfa44f99afc752ec173c9004fe3d59e; 90350aa626bed47b02d0c162462e5b0ca82be6b2; eed2a631d672a4130407f8d69a0ad9118a1e6e7d; 4e3e064e6613e2c40c1fa5dc2bd8fd934b410ccb; 62176de125738e3b95850d1227bac81fd646b78e; 7eaaa5aec72ffb95cf538462ed205fa4d4faef9c; 717392dac099d1506b766787382d61b277863163; e7ad08848d5d7c5c47673ffe0da06af443643bda; 751c100802012764a2c45e17e41fa219867b12e5; 1358f90705b05cdb20ebe6799b02196205e7e9f0; dca6c3927ade6481a1ae080f5c24decbfeced1be; 3e565c544a8639cc9c7568833e484d7610f5e5d4; 49293522fe3818769f5067e360c971bd7a82e0aa; 69619a2a47faee7a29ec596db13172e2a42ff921; 0aaf7a76507248d80f65b6a49e200d2370bcb2c9
- Manual Prompting | papers: c88cafa3e980765a64febe369ceb7c2aa7261d2a; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; b626560f19f815808a289ef5c24a17c57320da70; 6c1e1cc1e0e1f8fd026fe517607b2d4535565fa7; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691
- Automatic Prompting | papers: 6d003fce1bfa44f99afc752ec173c9004fe3d59e; 90350aa626bed47b02d0c162462e5b0ca82be6b2; eed2a631d672a4130407f8d69a0ad9118a1e6e7d; 4e3e064e6613e2c40c1fa5dc2bd8fd934b410ccb; 62176de125738e3b95850d1227bac81fd646b78e; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691; 7eaaa5aec72ffb95cf538462ed205fa4d4faef9c; 717392dac099d1506b766787382d61b277863163; e7ad08848d5d7c5c47673ffe0da06af443643bda; 751c100802012764a2c45e17e41fa219867b12e5
- Semi-automatic Prompting | papers: 1358f90705b05cdb20ebe6799b02196205e7e9f0; dca6c3927ade6481a1ae080f5c24decbfeced1be; 3e565c544a8639cc9c7568833e484d7610f5e5d4; 49293522fe3818769f5067e360c971bd7a82e0aa; 69619a2a47faee7a29ec596db13172e2a42ff921; 0aaf7a76507248d80f65b6a49e200d2370bcb2c9
- XoT Topological Variants | papers: fca92fe287c44c9ec79ca1f2762b0bf2e5e8df2b; c2408a3a8da4f12d3eb156fe359a96b428e5aff1; 6c1e1cc1e0e1f8fd026fe517607b2d4535565fa7; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691; 66d98dc2aad17c03532dbae21d05f098257cc2e2; 9e9e4df2996bac794c4f04cb887df3e553bae4fd; 3d473cbb7a377cf960abff31748a1a39bb6c7d7c; 3784fd84b61d482b52f7ef72aac66bcb886b892b; bda605928d6ebe4db906e69ab5d343df75918727; 2f3822eb380b5e753a6d579f31dfc3ec4c4a0820; 875d71bae61a66f7e65a2b6d363b7a0a27a6ed25; fdcef72d381d1ad3c374b602a2c1de7558250331; aade40af0d85b0b4fe15c97f6222d5c2e4d6d9b3; ba4aa83248a1d08b521392eb971e47d10b7c74e1; 19e499d76a2e49574b499cd9ebd31304880d33d6; be9447ccc05a0e8a07321272778c7574173cf00e

- Tree Structure | papers: 3d473cbb7a377cf960abff31748a1a39bb6c7d7c; 3784fd84b61d482b52f7ef72aac66bcb886b892b; bda605928d6ebe4db906e69ab5d343df75918727; 2f3822eb380b5e753a6d579f31dfc3ec4c4a0820; 875d71bae61a66f7e65a2b6d363b7a0a27a6ed25; fdcef72d381d1ad3c374b602a2c1de7558250331
- Graph Structure | papers: aade40af0d85b0b4fe15c97f6222d5c2e4d6d9b3; ba4aa83248a1d08b521392eb971e47d10b7c74e1; 19e499d76a2e49574b499cd9ebd31304880d33d6; be9447ccc05a0e8a07321272778c7574173cf00e
- XoT Enhancement Methods | papers: 6d4bacb69923e1e94fb4de468b939ce6db32fb51; cb4f6823e25896d5919046696066d0d498cc4397; 4d2a0840abd2eef795a4e14538271e06f8536b07; 22d5459d1f47341b355feeb1becc37208d6ec365; c715914c388fa64dd8686cd8755e5adfebbf2388; 0671fd553dd670a4e820553a974bc48040ba0819; 5d5dbba58aaf5b3fa4044cc3ffc71a3fe2b8c654; 3aaf6a2cbad5850ad81ab5c163599cb3d523436f; f02e8f1c9b5ab12ddfb1977570f9f5445a99a973; e826ac71dad8c4ce36d82fb7add43e3d306bb7e1; 8236010c2ecc94d826be6010ff187fdc000e7df6; 629c441076da3f8185b1cf85e8036064b714e249; 2ed0504ec0a97c3419a97e888abbf50f2b6976ab; 9890cef95f289670572c7f9093253a48f3a48c58; bcdaf6c98ddbd6809cf6241aa77200d7394db163; 20eecb9ead20ffe49a66588a9662336eefb20a54; 98aa313fbe30734eb3bb50683204765bcbc607eb; ef018d9fad6167cfddb7d6654c5422df1e953730; f58ca7ba4a08b7082e86b7a5989b4b0fda2107ab; 5988806996e8d12f5d4aa911960d842cf7be0c24; 07955e96cbd778d0ae2a68f09d073b866dd84c2a; f208ea909fa7f54fea82def9a92fd81dfc758c39; 5437e8adab596d7294124c0e798708e050e25321; 261549439aebdda72b648ecc462448fd24857ac1; 69335077fcacbff7a7cf25697da1949e6bdfa968; c90151f00b1ac4abf1cc353849b453aa21cc2df3; 622b064bd56d5be022f6dae9f7656fa8b658e0cf; 507acddb0b7f36b83fd7c8bff2f121eb506ac8fb; 3f4d11971f2c64be9125a7fe99c019588bbebf16; e070ff286709db28312e08b52b05539debe88146; 4b0b56be0ae9479d2bd5c2f0943db1906343c10f; 97992c13baa6185c03d9e672f53185bc59822596; 80fd20e175f83a699258b8780cf365418d1538b0; 9efa81ec4954b0859c47dad8f42edfaf8bced69b; 6db6e6e71cc54435265643e19fcbdc7f3ba4c772; 10955e63aa49fab146267949f8ebc9ebe8275183; 7e4f5589327b6b574cc950a03fd1d6236e9e6128; 0786c88990235414611478099e43611542d973b0; bd1ef429956cea3542c14006df67e890cb57a80b; 5f19ae1135a9500940978104ec15a5b8751bc7d2; d6045d2ccc9c09ca1671348de86d07da6bc28eea; d59e4560e3f3b8d53b0660e4ca2d6ea8d559787b; 03ae1a664b52503594e4753f59615443d70695b6; f176d0d466d7c778a6435fe9a8d7e49508cb9059; 385c74957858e7d6856d48e72b5a902b4c1aa28c; 4780d0a027c5c5a8e01d7cf697f6296880ffc945; 3fc3460c4554a28e489a0ea6ef067b79b7d301d9; b4a6c010724f0459c9791018e34a982cf96987cf; 3d473cbb7a377cf960abff31748a1a39bb6c7d7c; - Verify and Refine | papers: 6d4bacb69923e1e94fb4de468b939ce6db32fb51; cb4f6823e25896d5919046696066d0d498cc4397; 4d2a0840abd2eef795a4e14538271e06f8536b07; 22d5459d1f47341b355feeb1becc37208d6ec365; c715914c388fa64dd8686cd8755e5adfebbf2388; 0671fd553dd670a4e820553a974bc48040ba0819; 5d5dbba58aaf5b3fa4044cc3ffc71a3fe2b8c654; 3aaf6a2cbad5850ad81ab5c163599cb3d523436f; f02e8f1c9b5ab12ddfb1977570f9f5445a99a973; e826ac71dad8c4ce36d82fb7add43e3d306bb7e1; 8236010c2ecc94d826be6010ff187fdc000e7df6; 629c441076da3f8185b1cf85e8036064b714e249; 2ed0504ec0a97c3419a97e888abbf50f2b6976ab; 9890cef95f289670572c7f9093253a48f3a48c58; bcdaf6c98ddbd6809cf6241aa77200d7394db163; 20eecb9ead20ffe49a66588a9662336eefb20a54; 98aa313fbe30734eb3bb50683204765bcbc607eb; ef018d9fad6167cfddb7d6654c5422df1e953730
- Question Decompose | papers: f58ca7ba4a08b7082e86b7a5989b4b0fda2107ab; 5988806996e8d12f5d4aa911960d842cf7be0c24; 07955e96cbd778d0ae2a68f09d073b866dd84c2a; f208ea909fa7f54fea82def9a92fd81dfc758c39; 5437e8adab596d7294124c0e798708e050e25321; 261549439aebdda72b648ecc462448fd24857ac1; 69335077fcacbff7a7cf25697da1949e6bdfa968; c90151f00b1ac4abf1cc353849b453aa21cc2df3; 622b064bd56d5be022f6dae9f7656fa8b658e0cf; 507acddb0b7f36b83fd7c8bff2f121eb506ac8fb; 3f4d11971f2c64be9125a7fe99c019588bbebf16; e070ff286709db28312e08b52b05539debe88146
- Knowledge Enhancement | papers: 4b0b56be0ae9479d2bd5c2f0943db1906343c10f; 97992c13baa6185c03d9e672f53185bc59822596; 80fd20e175f83a699258b8780cf365418d1538b0; 9efa81ec4954b0859c47dad8f42edfaf8bced69b; 6db6e6e71cc54435265643e19fcbdc7f3ba4c772; 10955e63aa49fab146267949f8ebc9ebe8275183; 7e4f5589327b6b574cc950a03fd1d6236e9e6128; 0786c88990235414611478099e43611542d973b0; bd1ef429956cea3542c14006df67e890cb57a80b; a1675f47125aa409525c5f759b5e6bcc1c8831aa; e070ff286709db28312e08b52b05539debe88146
- Self-Ensemble | papers: c88cafa3e980765a64febe369ceb7c2aa7261d2a; f6007270b8aba3a69eac7c98375c99b7ca26c9b0; 7e4f5589327b6b574cc950a03fd1d6236e9e6128; 62f0db3a5ad5c795ec18fc7a6e7b01836809df57; 1e6102c981b9464c632ef0b00dbd11dfb0564e4e; 5f19ae1135a9500940978104ec15a5b8751bc7d2; d6045d2ccc9c09ca1671348de86d07da6bc28eea; d59e4560e3f3b8d53b0660e4ca2d6ea8d559787b; 03ae1a664b52503594e4753f59615443d70695b6; f176d0d466d7c778a6435fe9a8d7e49508cb9059; 385c74957858e7d6856d48e72b5a902b4c1aa28c; 4780d0a027c5c5a8e01d7cf697f6296880ffc945

- Frontier | papers: 0d42221038c05cee8443c5b5af838505ee137dc3; 95ca67ba607d7859ee8eec457f4b59b115d69bf5; 3bd83ff979f3c0e9470f23c360a18333593dc5a1; d1120d67b700e4dfe8b39eb1e48fbdea4e1a0c43; 32dcd0887537cece54e214f531d2c384470b023f; 12b233752c7097ea6525622bed238ae2d2193c5a; c7a9c7302a72301ed79a7c0696d5af2e03ad3ac4; 1bcde55995a957b3e8a595d536b816cb8989cf1d; b1c9c455acb1393f1bf60ec4095ee343531e404e; 99832586d55f540f603637e458a292406a0ed75d; 354bf043179e3e9f05df73e3f04517e53c326d1f; 017f1c28c7d4fb65c6fff7d3c2fff1687597e252; 446fb5dead075a1a08862662738f462e9a0e91c8; 0bfc804e31eecfd77f45e4ee7f4d629fffdcd628; 53d128ea815bcc0526856eb5a9c42cc977cb36a7; c7a3f9cc61cfafdc307f8ae24430b6b1121f9b2c; 8e37dc1215681aa153a51c07078ba8befd6a6e01; 6d003fce1bfa44f99afc752ec173c9004fe3d59e; 6ab33b17cd45e7cbd2cb9b0c5a2d56e5eac1c814; dcf87f11e245b76437c2f551c1ff6a7842585811; 700bd9681f1b9e9e2212e10415d27b11c7e6836b; a6c57acfbcec39af366d33db18cff1cb8803b27a; 003ef1cd670d01af05afa0d3c72d72228f494432; f176d0d466d7c778a6435fe9a8d7e49508cb9059; 5dbffedcabe3fa43060ebbe2b1789500edfd871f; 0671fd553dd670a4e820553a974bc48040ba0819; 3aaf6a2cbad5850ad81ab5c163599cb3d523436f; 5ce94181ea702f69c3651dce721d6bd8026b8106; 33eed6ea6805b59617fed7c41ef5825b5e4d1621; b272513916b45c8517d289d7abee4a53e6832187; bda605928d6ebe4db906e69ab5d343df75918727; 2f3822eb380b5e753a6d579f31dfc3ec4c4a0820; 1e98a9532d4e1fcf947d5b215e2cfabbf6cc41e0; 79e7ead8f59b17431de2b86af10dc0c30a1f5a2b; 0744580e75a74357e466a57082c85cb42f548aa9; a83724fd55cd2bcf5583ca181373c34571ac1f73; aad167be3c902388ea625da4117fcae4325b8b7d; 4411e6b32865933cab87696c2738cb7a204e4240; b29134737a0c81c13d31fc0263b3c4d4f05ccb78; 56fa65d8dc41708082f9b2ef7752c49cee9ebe01; 7a6a298efb965ce9a351a3212f6f536e94dbbb03; e892a225c417fbac7545c3e31b45d1c42dc9c933; 23dd78e424d32f6a48660dcd67ce994b8a7db8be; 8a6233a6b29f4880847412d7e2bd6d59b1812cc6; 3fa70115248377c3d1517c9f978791a296fbc1dd; fbd49b25bdab98c171af49962a41139c73dacbde; be7dbac2bcaed4cd034a7371004a011933e1bdca; 126a4776ff8315fd506766cb8f3c722cf746ad9e; 4b6a04202535ea67942f0ca656d51c4246da0495; 4f8608bb4b5943032bd23995a5b44d04d7faba3c; - Tool Use | papers: 0d42221038c05cee8443c5b5af838505ee137dc3; 95ca67ba607d7859ee8eec457f4b59b115d69bf5; 3bd83ff979f3c0e9470f23c360a18333593dc5a1; d1120d67b700e4dfe8b39eb1e48fbdea4e1a0c43; 32dcd0887537cece54e214f531d2c384470b023f; 12b233752c7097ea6525622bed238ae2d2193c5a; c7a9c7302a72301ed79a7c0696d5af2e03ad3ac4; 1bcde55995a957b3e8a595d536b816cb8989cf1d; b1c9c455acb1393f1bf60ec4095ee343531e404e; 99832586d55f540f603637e458a292406a0ed75d; 354bf043179e3e9f05df73e3f04517e53c326d1f; 017f1c28c7d4fb65c6fff7d3c2fff1687597e252; 446fb5dead075a1a08862662738f462e9a0e91c8; 0bfc804e31eecfd77f45e4ee7f4d629fffdcd628; 53d128ea815bcc0526856eb5a9c42cc977cb36a7; c7a3f9cc61cfafdc307f8ae24430b6b1121f9b2c
- Planning | papers: 8e37dc1215681aa153a51c07078ba8befd6a6e01; 6d003fce1bfa44f99afc752ec173c9004fe3d59e; 6ab33b17cd45e7cbd2cb9b0c5a2d56e5eac1c814; dcf87f11e245b76437c2f551c1ff6a7842585811; 700bd9681f1b9e9e2212e10415d27b11c7e6836b; a6c57acfbcec39af366d33db18cff1cb8803b27a; 003ef1cd670d01af05afa0d3c72d72228f494432; f176d0d466d7c778a6435fe9a8d7e49508cb9059; 5dbffedcabe3fa43060ebbe2b1789500edfd871f; 99832586d55f540f603637e458a292406a0ed75d; 0671fd553dd670a4e820553a974bc48040ba0819; 3aaf6a2cbad5850ad81ab5c163599cb3d523436f; 5ce94181ea702f69c3651dce721d6bd8026b8106; 33eed6ea6805b59617fed7c41ef5825b5e4d1621; b272513916b45c8517d289d7abee4a53e6832187; bda605928d6ebe4db906e69ab5d343df75918727; 2f3822eb380b5e753a6d579f31dfc3ec4c4a0820; 1e98a9532d4e1fcf947d5b215e2cfabbf6cc41e0; 79e7ead8f59b17431de2b86af10dc0c30a1f5a2b
- Distillation | papers: 0744580e75a74357e466a57082c85cb42f548aa9; a83724fd55cd2bcf5583ca181373c34571ac1f73; aad167be3c902388ea625da4117fcae4325b8b7d; 4411e6b32865933cab87696c2738cb7a204e4240; b29134737a0c81c13d31fc0263b3c4d4f05ccb78; 56fa65d8dc41708082f9b2ef7752c49cee9ebe01; 7a6a298efb965ce9a351a3212f6f536e94dbbb03; e892a225c417fbac7545c3e31b45d1c42dc9c933; 23dd78e424d32f6a48660dcd67ce994b8a7db8be; 8a6233a6b29f4880847412d7e2bd6d59b1812cc6; 3fa70115248377c3d1517c9f978791a296fbc1dd; fbd49b25bdab98c171af49962a41139c73dacbde; be7dbac2bcaed4cd034a7371004a011933e1bdca; 126a4776ff8315fd506766cb8f3c722cf746ad9e; 4b6a04202535ea67942f0ca656d51c4246da0495; 4f8608bb4b5943032bd23995a5b44d04d7faba3c; bb8f7fbec020675d269ccfa0e6e603f02b664c0d; 1bd9466f0bb10d29a16f614943ec7823e13cb210; dac96fa0198b4b15191aa022257edce349f41d2a; 4ba57555bef02f988f2ed3bab2f102733dc55221; 38333f6e8f0388968edc4b2ea7a683ce69677e69

- Benchmarks | papers: b123a0d46ad917b79c43c5ae981e03ed2458ed11; f13e41d24e5d0a68ca662c1b49de398a6fb68251; a7862e14b4c20cefd6dc4f611f8aa866fabf130b; d96997265f8146e93b4c9350f19d55e46d1317f0; dda6fb309f62e2557a071522354d8c2c897a2805;
